name: Henry T. Perkins
headline: Customer-Facing Technical Consultant & Community Builder
location: Greater Chicago Area, Illinois (Open to US Remote)
summary: Customer-facing technical professional with 10+ years across SaaS support, developer community management, web consulting, and operations leadership. I diagnose complex user issues, document repeatable solutions, and connect customer feedback to practical product and process improvements.

Built and supported a 50+ developer ecosystem at PageLines
Improved service speed by 18% year over year in Starbucks operations
Maintained $35K-$45K weekly sales in high-volume leadership roles
Managed and coached teams of up to 25 staff members

Build support-oriented solutions using WordPress, WooCommerce, Cloudflare, and AI-assisted workflows.
